data.name: 在無限重生中守護妳
data.detailed_description:
玩家扮演男主角京介與未婚妻惠沙來到海上孤島遊玩，參加了島上神秘的祭神節，可這座島嶼似乎蟄伏著來自深淵的巨大恐懼……無盡的噩夢之中，可愛的未婚妻惠沙，正衣不蔽體地任憑他人——及難以名狀之物凌辱摧殘

「無論重來多少次，我一定要拯救妳！」

我深信，自己會一輩子和她在一起。



因此，我絕對不會輕易放棄。



此外在無止境的輪迴中, 我邂逅了神秘的紫髮少女 , 這位少女與這座荒島究竟隱藏著怎樣的秘密 ?

◆遊戲特色


◇24張基本CG，包含差分300張以上
◇遊戲文字10萬字
◇兩位主要女角，三位次要女角
◇無限流劇情向、克蘇魯風格遊戲
◇含群交、觸手、獵奇表現
◇遊戲結局：2種

◆特色系統


　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG
　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

玩家扮演男主角京介與未婚妻惠沙來到海上孤島遊玩，參加了島上神秘的祭神節，可這座島嶼似乎蟄伏著來自深淵的巨大恐懼……無盡的噩夢之中，可愛的未婚妻惠沙，正衣不蔽體地任憑他人——及難以名狀之物凌辱摧殘

data.short_description: 京介與未婚妻惠理沙來到海上孤島遊玩，參加了島上神秘的祭神節，本應是浪漫動人的度假，可這座島嶼似乎蟄伏著來自深淵的巨大恐懼……一場充滿淫邪、腥色和渾沌的無盡夢魘就此反覆糾纏……
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文, 法文, 德文, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 越南文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Rescuing You in the Infinite Loop
data.detailed_description:
The player takes on the role of Kyosuke, who took his fiancée, Erisa, to visit a lonely island in the sea. They attended a mysterious festival of the island's god, but the island seemed to be dormant with a great fear from the abyss…in an endless nightmare, the cute fiancée Erisa was abused and assaulted by others – and unspeakable things – at their will, with hardly any clothes on.

“No matter how many times I have to do it, I will save you!”

I believed that I would be with her all my life.



That was why I would never give up so easily.



And in an endless loop, I met a mysterious purple-haired girl. What secrets did this girl and this desert island hold?

◆ Game Features


◇ 24 basic CGs, including more than 300 differentials
◇ Game text: 100,000
◇ Two main female characters and three secondary female characters
◇ A Cthulhu-style game with an infinite flow storyline
◇ Contains group sex, tentacles, and grotesque scenes
◇ Game endings: 2 types

◆Featured Systems


◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.
◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

data.short_description: Kyosuke and his fiancée, Erisa, are visiting an isolated island in the sea and attending a mysterious festival to make a sacrifice to the island's gods. It should have been a romantic holiday, but the island seemed to be overshadowed by a great fear coming from the abyss...
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Vietnamese, Spanish - Spain, Turkish
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
